status.sql: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(f.value::STRING, 'import ', ''), '(', '')) AS package_name, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM "SAMPLE_CONTENTS", LATERAL FLATTEN(input => "content") f WHERE f.value IS NOT NULL AND f.value ILIKE '%"%' GROUP BY package_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 10;
